nasb.text: The man who acts presumptuously by not listening to the priest who stands there to serve the Lord your God, nor to the judge, that man shall die; thus you shall purge the evil from Israel.

esv.text: The man who acts presumptuously by not obeying the priest who stands to minister there before the Lord your God, or the judge, that man shall die. So you shall purge the evil from Israel.

cnv.text: 如果有人擅自行事，不聽從祭司，就是侍立在那裡事奉耶和華你的　神的，或是不聽從審判官，那人就必須處死；這樣，你就可以把這惡從以色列中肅清了。

ccb.text: 如果有人不肯接受事奉你们上帝耶和华的祭司和审判官的判决，就必须处死他。如此，你们便从以色列除掉了罪恶，
